memory_entries.text: Product SQLite dataset mapping discovered: electronics dataset uses items_g2 with taxonomy taxn_g2; items_g2 price is stored both as integer cents(?) in prc and dollars in prc_usd. The 'Computers & Accessories' top-level taxonomy appears in taxn_g2 as cat_lvl=1, cat_nm='Computers & Accessories'. Office products appear primarily in items_g1; musical instruments likely g3.
